description_long: This is a compact electronic keyboard, specifically a Korg synthesizer, featuring a beige and brown color scheme with a prominent 'KORG' logo on the front panel. The keyboard has a set of white and black keys, typical of musical keyboards, and an array of control knobs, sliders, and buttons above the keys for sound modulation and effects. The top panel is densely populated with labeled controls, including rotary dials, switches, and LED indicators, suggesting advanced sound-shaping capabilities. The casing appears to be made of plastic with metallic elements, and the rear and side panels show various input/output ports for connectivity. The overall build is rectangular and relatively low-profile, designed for tabletop use. The surface finish is smooth with some glossy elements on the control panel.
description: A compact Korg synthesizer keyboard with white and black keys, beige and brown casing, and a control panel filled with knobs, sliders, and buttons. The front displays the 'KORG' logo and multiple input/output ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'KORG' logo, input/output ports, and the full set of keys and control panel.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the keyboard, the control knobs, and the side panel details.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the entire keybed, all control elements, and the layout of the interface.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view focusing on the right side of the keyboard and the arrangement of the controls.
attribute_key_layout: Synthesizer layout (mini keys, no numpad, with control section)
